response.original_title: Age of Deceit 4: Eschaton Cipher and the Counterfeit Ledger of Life
response.overview: As blockchain technology emerges as a cornerstone of modern society, its promises of transparency and decentralization mask a deeper, more profound influence on the future of humanity. What about the ongoing advancements in AI and the advent of Quantum Computing?  Age of Deceit 4 explores the hidden spiritual implications of this technology, drawing connections to biblical prophecy and the Book of Life.  In a world increasingly defined by digital ledgers and data, could we be witnessing the rise of a counterfeit system designed to replace the divine record of humanity?  This film uncovers the profound consequences of this technological shift, urging us to consider its impact on our spiritual destiny.
response.title: Age of Deceit 4: Eschaton Cipher and the Counterfeit Ledger of Life
